## Module

Which module is affected? (e.g. `arr/sonarr`, `metadata/video/tmdb`)

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## To Reproduce

1. Create client with `...`
2. Call `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages if applicable.

## Environment

- Go version:
- goenvoy module version:
- Target service version (if relevant):

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
